title: bao basket
description: raid dens ! lucky blocks ! battle tower ! ranks ! battle pass ! gen 4 pokeball stickers & mining minigame ! outbreak charms ! statues ! an all inclusive, friendly player base server!! started as a small group of friends and recently opened to other players
body:
HAPPY LUNAR NEW YEAR !! ~~
started as a small group of friends, we have finally decided to go public !! 
JOIN US TODAY FOR A PLUSHIE OF YOUR CHOICE AND A SHINY STARTER ~~ 
we are a cosy smp server that would like to meet some new friends <3
we are open to everyone !! 
we are so excited to meet you all :3 

we have a lot of exciting features:
⋆⟢ raid dens
⋆⟢ gen 4 pokeball stickers and mining minigame
⋆⟢ lucky blocks
⋆⟢ battle tower
⋆⟢ outbreak charms
⋆⟢ legend spawns
⋆⟢ megas and za megas
⋆⟢ battlepass
⋆⟢ cobblemon breeding
⋆⟢ events
⋆⟢ ranks
⋆⟢ particle effects / auras
⋆⟢ plushies and plushie wands (turn any pokemon you want into a plushie :o)
⋆⟢ crates and crate keys
⋆⟢ player warps and server warps

⭑.ᐟ PLAYER GYMS ⭑.ᐟ
WE HAVE RECENTLY INTRODUCED PLAYER GYMS
since we are a smaller server, the staff and i personally help players make their gym ideas come to life ~~ we currently have 4 player gyms under construction :D so join now to claim yours ! i also do all the art for the server so am looking to make custom badges in the near future :3 all gym leaders can request certain designs ! this will be a fully customisable experience 

⭑.ᐟ BUILDERS RANK ⭑.ᐟ
BRAND NEW BUILDERS RANK
designed specifically for builders, players may have access to a free blocks shop and chisel to add pokemon statues to their builds ! cobblemon statues support different forms and animations ~~ join us to try it out! :3
